acceptance.proof: Valid, malformed, oversized, timeout, cancellation, request-limit, and immediate-rebind loopback cases terminate within explicit bounds with typed outcomes.
The pinned official public client either admits the Rust response on IPv4 loopback or preserves an exact sanitized bounded failure without broad compatibility claims.
Raw packets, XML, endpoints, diagnostics, binaries, environments, and caches remain private; public evidence contains only typed outcomes, pins, and hashes.
No multicast, interface selection, non-loopback reachability, background service, sample changes, devices, unsafe/FFI, or Manifold authority is added.

commit_policy: Commit the bounded responder, synthetic loopback coverage, sanitized official observation, validation lifecycle, and push preparation intentionally; preserve every failed attempt.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route the bounded reverse-discovery runtime and exact exclusions.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Run focused, owner, privacy, and workflow gates.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Describe the bounded responder and observation without broad claims.
Document responder ownership and finite activation.
Bind private evidence hashes without raw publication.
Route responder bounds, cleanup, official observation, and privacy checks.
Review closed activation and authority ownership.

non_scope: Official implementation source, copied or translated source, multicast, broadcast destination policy, interface enumeration or selection, non-loopback reachability, retries, background service, or ecosystem-wide compatibility.
Stream handshake, samples, clocks, queues, recovery, other formats, devices, dependencies, unsafe, FFI, or private raw publication.
Manifold admission, registry, session, route, topology, lease, authorization, replay, or audit authority.
objective: Implement one finite caller-configured IPv4 UDP short-info responder that admits an accepted LSLC-002D query and returns one caller-supplied accepted LSLC-002F response, then observe the pinned official public client against it on loopback using public APIs and black-box behavior only.
outputs: One synchronous responder call with explicit nonzero datagram, request-count, receive-slice, total-deadline, and cancellation bounds plus scope-owned socket cleanup.
Typed admission of the accepted query and exact response projection without endpoint selection, background service, or ambient authority.
Pinned official-client IPv4-loopback observation publishing only sanitized typed outcomes and private-evidence hashes.
